name: A totally normal 'massage'
description:
Your a tired office worker who has decided to visit a massage parlor to relieve some of your built up stress. However something seems slightly wrong here...

Warning
Contains heavy non-con.

Things to note:

  • This is Your thoughts, This is the hypnosis. You don't have to obey the hypnosis but all my example dialogue will have {{user}} submitting. Plus do not use '*' and '**' to talk directly to the bot as it will get confused.

  • Use a persona, it will greatly improve your experience.

  • Also use chat memory if you intend to leave the massage salon and then come back later.
creator: Penguin070
